name: Clinkz
description: Better to run than curse the road.

abilities.name: Infernal Shred
abilities.description: Attacks now apply an armor piercing stacking debuff that affects the armor damage factor. Only affects attack damage sourced to Clinkz' and his Skeleton Archers Max Armor Piercing Bonus: 20%. Armor Piercing per Attack: 3%. Duration: 5. Armor Piercing per Attack: 1%.

abilities.name: Strafe
abilities.description: The buff grants a portion of the bonus attack speed to all ignited Archers Effect Radius: 1200. Attack Speed Bonus: 120/160/200/240 (520/560/600/640). Attack Range Bonus: 200. Duration: 3.5 (4.25). Archer Attack Speed Bonus Factor: 0.4. Cooldown: 30/25/20/15 (21/16/11/6). Mana Cost: 60/70/80/90.

abilities.name: Searing Arrows
abilities.description: Imbues Clinkz' and his Skeleton Archers' arrows with spell damage bonus. The spell damage bonus fully affects buildings. Cast Range: 600 (650). Max Attack Targets: 1 (2). Spell Damage Bonus: 20/35/50/65. Building Damage Factor: 1. Max Attack Targets: 1. Attack Order Radius: 4000. Cooldown: 10.

abilities.name: Death Pact
abilities.description: Sutherex' bond of life and death has become a part of Clinkz, and his old bones are refreshed with repetition of the pact on lesser beings. Cast Range: 700. Self Max Health Bonus: 175/250/325/400 (215/290/365/440). Health Bonus as Self Heal: 100%. Cooldown: 0. Mana Cost: 60.

abilities.name: Burning Army
abilities.description: Summons an array of fiery Skeleton Archers toward the point-targeted direction. Cast Range: 600. Total Distance: 900. Number of Archers per Cast: 6. Archers Spawn Interval: 0.1. Total Spawn Time: 0.5. Cooldown: 70. Mana Cost: 150.

abilities.name: Burning Barrage
abilities.description: Channels and shoots multiple piercing arrows in the target direction that hit all enemy units for a portion of Clinkz' attack damage while applying attack modifiers. Cast Range: 850 (900). Arrow Travel Distance: 850 (900). Arrow Collision Radius: 200. Max Channel Time: 2. Number of Arrows: 6. Instant Attack Damage Factor: 0.75. Cooldown: 17. Mana Cost: 40.

abilities.name: Skeleton Walk
abilities.description: Summons Skeleton Archers upon leaving Skeleton Walk. There can only be one pack of Skeleton Walk-based Skeleton Archers at any given time. The Skeleton Archers levels up with this ability. Some of Clinkz' abilities, including Clinkz' death, can summon these immobile and uncontrollable Skeleton Archers to attack enemy units. Certain Archers' attributes corresponds to Clinkz' current attributes. Fade Time: 0.6. Move Speed Bonus: 25%/35%/45%. Invisibility Duration: 30/40/45. Current Hit Count as Damage: 100%. Hero Hit Count: 2. Attack Interval: 1.6. Cooldown: 24/21/18 (20/17/14). Mana Cost: 80/105/130.
